headline: Abbott declares 410th consecutive quarterly dividend
summary: The board of directors of Abbott (NYSE: ABT) today declared a quarterly common dividend of 63 cents per share.

headline: Abbott Laboratories Remains Structurally Undervalued
summary: Abbott Laboratories leverages its Exact Sciences acquisition and global diagnostics trends against peer valuation discounts. Read why ABT stock is a strong buy.
